name: Soundwave Productions
description: A unique hybrid entertainment experience blending live musicians with professional DJ production. We pair a string duo for your ceremony with a high-energy DJ for the reception, giving you the best of both worlds without booking two separate vendors.

includes: String duo (violin and cello) for ceremony
Custom ceremony song arrangements (up to 4 songs)
Live saxophone player for cocktail hour (1 hour)
Professional DJ and MC for reception
Live saxophone player for cocktail hour
Dance floor lighting and uplighting (12 fixtures)
Wireless mics for officiant and speeches (3)
Seamless transition from live to DJ
Day-of coordination with venue and vendors

saxophone_cocktail_hour.note: Included in full_event, add-on for reception_only

service_area.note: Regularly travels to South Coast MA, Cape Cod, and Greater Boston for the right events.

venue_partnerships.note: New to the Massachusetts market. Strong relationships with RI and South Coast MA venues. Expanding into Greater Boston and Cape Cod.

playlist_consultation.process: Online planning portal opens upon booking for song requests and do-not-play lists. Video consultation 4-5 weeks before the wedding to finalize timeline, ceremony arrangements, cocktail hour setlist, and reception flow. Separate consultation with string duo for ceremony music if custom arrangements are requested.

cancellation_policy.under_30_days: Full payment required — musicians booked and arrangements in progress

highlights: string duo for the ceremony was breathtaking
best of both worlds — live music AND a great DJ
seamless transition from elegant to party

sweeteners: Free saxophone cocktail hour add-on for full-event bookings in off-season
Complimentary uplighting color match to wedding palette
Upgrade to string trio (add viola) at no cost for Sunday weddings
Free ceremony rehearsal run-through for full-event clients
10% discount for Rhode Island venue partners
personality: Versatile, polished, and collaborative. Soundwave's unique hybrid model appeals to couples who want live music and a party DJ without managing two vendors. Excellent at coordinating the transition from ceremony elegance to reception energy. Willing to customize musician lineups. Strong relationships with RI and South Coast MA venues.
